title: フクキタル的オマジナイ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are on our way back to
the academy after a day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I trip on something and fall over.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Are you okay, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! Your shoelaces have snapped!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is just as bad as the straps on your geta
sandals breaking! My unlucky streak is back to
wreak havoc once more!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, didn't something like this happen before?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, this is no laughing matter! We must
perform a warding ritual right away to keep you
safe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's put this luck-boosting magic I saw
on the internet to the test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is called the hand-holding spell! Your luck
improves when you hold someone's hand!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now, take hold of my hand!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There is no time for hesitation! Don't you see that
havoc is upon us?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Come on, hurry up!
choice_data_list: Brush it off with a high five.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Let the luck-boosting commence! Ho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
See, don't you feel how toasty your hands are
with all the lucky power seeping in?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... It feels a lot warmer than when I perform
this spell with other people.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Could it be that you're brimming with good luck?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehe, what an interesting discovery!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Matikanefukukitaru becomes a bit
obsessed with the hand-holding spell, trying it
with me whenever her luck is bad.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh uh... Woo?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't really understand why, but I feel so
uplifted!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do high fives possess some sort of hidden
power?! Could it be that this is far more powerful
than the hand-holding spell?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All right, let's keep going! Yeah, high five!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Haha, this is so much fun! Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to high-five in front of the entrance
for about half an hour. Strangely enough, it
makes for a good bit of stress relief.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What?! Are you sure you want to pass on this?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Could this be your way of protecting me?! You're
too kind...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're worried the havoc that plagues you will be
passed on to me instead, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But there's no need to worry! Trainers and the
Umamusume they mentor are bound by destiny,
so what's yours is already mine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, I appreciate your consideration. In
return, I shall try my hand at another type of
spell!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nrggh... No bad luck will befall my trainer!
Depart, depart at once!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She casts several protective spells over me as we
make our way home, declaring that it would be
disastrous if anything happened to me.
